name: 12-factor-agents
title: 12-factor-agents
summary: Audit and refactor LLM Agent systems for reliability, context discipline, tool contracts, control flow, human-in-the-loop design, and production readiness.
recommended_trigger_phrases: Use the 12-factor-agents skill to review this agent project.
Use the 12-factor-agents skill to refactor this project into a production-ready agent architecture.
review_protocol: Identify project type and user-facing goal.
Inspect relevant files and infer missing context conservatively.
Run available validation commands or record why they could not run.
